failClosedPolicy: Consumers must stop on missing compatibility metadata, manifest/package version mismatch, unsupported devtools protocol version, or unsupported publish artifact format; do not infer compatibility from local paths or private imports.
pinningGuidance: asha-demo and asha-studio should pin @asha/game-workspace by package path plus ASHA git commit until registry/version publishing exists and record compatibility diagnostics in evidence artifacts.
